message:
feat(ffs-core): device-based inode read pipeline (bd-10t)

Add read_inode(), read_inode_attr(), and read_group_desc() to OpenFs
for reading ext4 inodes via ByteDevice I/O instead of in-memory slices.
Uses locate_inode() + inode_device_offset() from ffs-ondisk for
validated inode location math with checked arithmetic.

Extract inode_to_attr() as standalone function shared between OpenFs
and Ext4FsOps. Add ext4_superblock() accessor to OpenFs.

5 new tests with synthetic ext4 image containing group descriptor
and root inode: device read, attr conversion, bounds checking.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
